source.ref: TonyMilkdrop - Leonardo Da Vinci's Balloon [Flexi - merry-go-round + techstyle]

display.name: TonyMilkdrop - Da Vinci's Balloon
display.author: TonyMilkdrop
display.blurb: A Renaissance balloon drifting through a mechanical sky.

annotation.technical_notes: A classic reaction-diffusion simulation generated via a per-pixel warp shader and heavy frame feedback in sampler_main. The high-contrast, biomorphic cellular structures expand and morph in response to the bass in the audio, while background noise textures are modulated by mid frequencies. A slow hue cycle rotates the background color washes from deep purples to vibrant greens.
